title: C3: Team / org support
description: Multi-user groups, team leaderboards, sprint retro views. Deferred until 500+ users. Category C - major changes.

title: Phase 1: Visual polish + top 3 podium redesign
description: Redesign top 3 cards with flexbox podium layout (2-1-3 order, items-end). Increase avatar sizes, add gold/silver/bronze borders, hover lift effects. Improve typography and spacing across landing and leaderboard pages.

title: A4: Streak tracking
description: Compute longest streak + current streak from daily_usage dates. Display on profile. Category A - can build now.

title: C5: Anthropic integration
description: Pull power users for beta testing, pricing experiments. Partnership, not code. Category C - major changes.

title: A7: Upload success screen with rank deltas
description: Post-upload: show rank change, metric deltas. 'Your Output/$ went up 12%\!' Category A - can build now.

title: B11: Community feed
description: /learn page aggregating journal entries. Voting system. Depends on B10. Category B - needs small changes.

title: B1: Peer comparison insights
description: 'Users in your spend bracket average 450 tokens/$.' Cohort averages via SQL aggregation. Only useful at 50+ users. Category B - needs small changes. MONETIZATION - Layer 2.

title: A1: Model breakdown view
description: Show which models each user uses most. Data already in models_used JSON column. Category A - can build now.

title: Phase 5: Shareable social stats cards for viral growth
description: Opt-in shareable card at /card/:userId. Two modes: simple (rank+cost+title) and full (all stats). SVG-to-PNG generation on Workers for OG image previews. Download button for image. Share on X button. Requires sharing_enabled column on users table. OG tags so Twitter/LinkedIn show rich preview when link is shared.
close_reason: Phase 5 shareable social cards implemented and deployed

title: C6: ccrank CLI binary
description: Standalone tool (Rust/Go) that replaces npx ccusage + adds project tracking + auto-upload. Category C - major changes. Separate project.

title: A9: Aggregate usage intelligence & benchmarks
description: Mine anonymized aggregate ccusage data for insights: model mix vs efficiency correlations, session patterns, spending curves, tool preferences, cohort benchmarks. Powers personalized guidance (A6/B1/B2) with real data instead of static thresholds. Data flywheel: more uploads → richer benchmarks → better guidance → more uploads. Category A - can build now from existing daily_usage + models_used data.

title: B5: Weekly digest emails
description: 'Your rank changed: #3 → #2.' Needs email provider integration (e.g., Resend). Category B - needs small changes.

title: B4: API for programmatic uploads
description: Authenticated endpoint so users can curl their reports. New api_keys table. Category B - needs small changes.

title: A5: CSV export
description: Download your daily_usage as CSV. API endpoint + button on dashboard. Category A - can build now.

title: C4: Slack/Discord bot
description: Post rankings to team chat. Needs webhook infra. Category C - major changes.

title: B12: RSS import for learning
description: Users point to blog RSS, entries auto-imported to journal. Depends on B10. Category B - needs small changes.

title: C1: Auto project detection binary
description: Binary (Rust/Go) that wraps ccusage + captures git repo context automatically. Category C - major changes. Separate project.

title: A8: Milestone notifications
description: 'You crossed $100\! You now qualify for efficiency rankings.' Shown on dashboard. Category A - can build now.

title: A6: Metric-specific tips (static guidance)
description: Show guidance based on metric thresholds on dashboard/profile. Server-side logic in templates. Compare user metrics against top-3 averages. Category A - can build now. MONETIZATION WEDGE - Layer 1.

title: Phase 4: Multi-machine source tracking
description: 3-step zero-downtime migration: (1) Add source column + new unique index keeping old, (2) Deploy code with source field in upload form and updated UPSERT, (3) Drop old index after verification.

title: B10: Journal entries on profile
description: Free-text entries tied to date ranges. New journal_entries table. Category B - needs small changes. Prerequisite for B11 and B12.

title: A2: Trend sparklines on profiles
description: Mini cost/efficiency line charts using last 30/90 days of daily_usage data. Category A - can build now.

title: B2: Trend-based nudges
description: 'Your efficiency improved 15% this week.' Two-period comparison queries on dashboard. Category B - needs small changes. MONETIZATION - Layer 3.

title: Pre-impl: Extract shared utilities to src/utils.ts
description: Extract formatTokens, formatCost, timeAgo, escapeHtml from html.ts into src/utils.ts. Add ViewType union, DateRange interface, sanitizeSource, isValidDateString helpers.

title: B8: Manual project tagging
description: Tag date ranges with project names. 'Feb 1-7: Built auth system.' New projects table. Category B - needs small changes.

title: C2: ROI per feature
description: 'This feature cost 50k tokens and shipped in 2 hours.' Needs project tagging (B8 or C1) first. Category C - major changes.

title: Phase 2: Origin story snippet + About page + ccusage credits
description: Add WhatsApp chat bubble origin story on homepage linking to /about. Create About page with 4 base64-embedded screenshots, origin story, how-it-works, and credits section. Add Powered by ccusage to homepage footer.

title: B9: Personal goals / budgets
description: User sets monthly cost target, profile shows progress bar. New column on users table. Category B - needs small changes.

title: GitHub commit history integration
description: Token usage alone isn't meaningful without knowing what was shipped. Integrate GitHub commit history to correlate Claude Code spend with actual code output. Enables: tokens-per-commit, cost-per-PR, productivity curves, and real ROI measurement. Needs brainstorming to determine approach (GitHub API, user-provided data, CLI binary, etc.).

title: Phase 3: Time travel historical leaderboards
description: Create /history route with daily/weekly/monthly tabs. Add prev/next date navigation. Query existing daily_usage table with date ranges. Show top 10 per period. Add History link to nav bar.

title: B3: Source comparison view
description: Side-by-side: laptop vs cloud usage. New profile tab using existing source data. Category B - needs small changes.
